---
title: "Contact"
---
# 📈 For academics and industrial project : 

If we met at a conference and you were to shy to say hi, or if 
you developped an interest on enhancing your mathematical models 👇

[📧 E-mail adress](mailto:gbocho@tu-berlin.de)


# 🚧 Social Media 

I recently decided to start on social media. 
If you would like to collaborate, this is where the magic happens !
From sport to scientific content 👇
[🔥Socials](https://linktr.ee/alexscifit)

# GitHub

[⚡GitHub](https://github.com/AlexN7-Shepard)
